steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to "emphasize the size" of the sculpture. Specific measurements convey size more effectively than vague adjectives like "large." Note 3 provides the key data: the sculpture is roughly 6 feet wide and 12 feet tall.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'uses vague language': describes the sculpture as "large" without any concrete dimensions. ✗
  • Choice B — 'ignores size entirely': focuses on something other than the sculpture's physical dimensions. ✗
  • Choice C — 'uses vague language': like A, relies on subjective description rather than measurable data. ✗
  • Choice D — 'stretches roughly 6 feet wide and 12 feet tall': directly includes both measurements from Note 3, making the size concrete and vivid. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
